description:
User-configurable workflow parameters.

All parameters have sensible defaults. Override via params.yaml or CLI.

outlier_threshold.description: Custom threshold (uses DataEval default if None)
outlier_threshold.title: Outlier Threshold

outlier_use_dimension.description: Use dimension statistics for outlier detection
outlier_use_dimension.title: Outlier Use Dimension

outlier_use_pixel.description: Use pixel statistics for outlier detection
outlier_use_pixel.title: Outlier Use Pixel

outlier_use_visual.description: Use visual statistics for outlier detection
outlier_use_visual.title: Outlier Use Visual

mode.description: advisory: report only, preparatory: modify dataset
mode.title: Mode

title: WorkflowParameters
